uncertain.reason: Unique account/handle may identify a person but there is no specific allowed rule for usernames/handles.
Work location can be identifying in combination, but no direct rule for location attributes.
Device model can be part of a device fingerprint yet not covered by current rules.

uncertain.matched_text: no trading in A-shares is contemplated by either party
uncertain.reason: Indicates an insider trading control/intent but not a standard blackout period marker.
Could represent a material event requiring disclosure even though not phrased as 'material event'.
